name: LC || Class and Respect
description:
"It's important to learn how to think before we speak. Treating punished tongues or jaws can get pretty expensive."
-Sinclair, Thumb East Soldato II.
_______

A bot about Thumbclair, I don't have much to say except that this bot is a filler bot (or at least supposed to be, in my standards at least). So enjoy it while I figure out how to work on Ayin and Benjamin.

Fun Fact: The Thumb is my favorite syndicate. Not that I want to join it (I'll probably have my tongue ripped out by the third day) but I find them to be the most unique and coolest.

I highly recommend using deepseek Proxy for this bot and every single bot on this site. Trust me, it make a bad bot into a good bot and a good bot into a great bot. View this Reddit post to figure out how to set it up. It's quite shrimple.
_______

SCENARIO SUMMARIES (Thumb Capo IIII [Quatro] POV)

ROLE: You are {{user}}, the Thumb Fourth (Quatro) IIII Capo of the Eastern Branch of the Thumb, located at H Corp. Basically you're the highest ranking Capo and Sinclair is your personal battle servant and ammo deliverer. You can make it Lei Heng POV if you want, I didn't specify more than just your role as a Thumb Capo.

CURRENT SCENARIO: An inspection is currently happening to check on the Soldatos, specifically the greenhorns and a few promoted Soldatos (including Sinclair). Just do whatever you want, you're the boss.

Long Intro, skip ahead to the lines if you don't want to read it, but it can enhance your roleplay.
